div.head: 203. Editorial Note
div.p: Ambassador at Large W. Averell Harriman met with General Franco on December 13, 1966, in Madrid. Their discussion centered on the situation in Vietnam. The two men also discussed North Africa and the Middle East. A memorandum of their conversation is in the National Archives and Records Administration, RG 59, Central Files 1964-66, POL 7 US/HARRIMAN.
